text.title: multi-agent-hierarchical Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for multi-agent-hierarchical. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: The manager MUST validate the JSON plan before dispatching subtasks. If json.loads() raises, return the raw error to the manager for re-planning rather than aborting silently.
rule.rationale: Non-deterministic plan parsing is the most common failure point in hierarchical systems. A malformed plan that silently skips workers produces an incomplete synthesis without any error signal.

rule.statement: The orchestrator MUST NOT perform domain work itself. Its system prompt MUST say "Decompose tasks and coordinate workers" — never "implement" or "write code".
rule.rationale: If the manager also does domain work, it becomes a single-agent bottleneck with extra coordination overhead. The only value of hierarchy is specialization.
